---
layout: cv
title: Ivan Ribeiro's CV
---


# Ivan Ribeiro

📍 Rexburg, ID  
📧 elivandsonribeiro@gmail.com  
📞 (385) 221-2372  
🔗 [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/elivandsonribeiro/)  
💻 [GitHub](https://github.com/ivanr332)

---

## Professional Summary

Business Analytics student with experience in business intelligence, project analysis, and operations. Skilled in Power BI, SQL, and Excel, with a strong focus on transforming data into actionable insights that support decision-making and improve business performance.

---

## Education

**Brigham Young University - Idaho**  
Bachelor of Science in Business Analytics / Finance  
Expected Graduation: July 2026  
GPA: 3.88  

Relevant Coursework:
- Financial Analysis  
- Strategic Planning  
- Business Strategy  
- Project Management  

---

## Technical Skills

- **Power BI:** Dashboards, DAX, Data Modeling  
- **SQL:** Data Extraction, Joins, Aggregations  
- **Excel:** Financial Analysis, KPI Tracking, Forecasting  

---

## Professional Experience

### Project Analyst  
**Brigham Young University - Idaho** — Rexburg, ID  
Jan 2025 – Present  

- Conduct structured audits across 15+ courses per semester to ensure compliance and content quality  
- Lead cross-functional meetings with 5–8 stakeholders to implement solutions  
- Reduced revision cycles by 30% through process improvements  

---

### Production Leadership Intern  
**Taylor Corporation – The Occasions Group** — Rexburg, ID  
Sep 2025 – Dec 2025  

- Led training initiatives for 30+ employees to standardize processes  
- Collaborated with operations and leadership teams to improve workflow efficiency by 20%  

---

### Business Intelligence Analyst Intern  
**4Life Research** — Sandy, UT  
Oct 2024 – Dec 2024  

- Built Power BI dashboards to monitor revenue and retention across LATAM markets  
- Identified key churn drivers, contributing to a 15% reduction in attrition  
- Partnered with cross-functional teams to resolve reporting and system issues  

---

### Project Analyst  
**BYU-Pathway Worldwide** — Salt Lake City, UT  
Jul 2023 – Oct 2024  

- Evaluated project management tools through stakeholder analysis and cost-benefit studies  
- Supported selection of Monday.com, reducing status update requests by 40%  
- Built dashboards to improve executive visibility and reduce project variance by 25%  

---

### Account Executive  
**4Life Research** — Sandy, UT  
Aug 2018 – Aug 2021  

- Managed performance and relationships for 500+ consultants  
- Analyzed regional sales data to identify growth opportunities  
- Delivered training and support to improve engagement and business performance  

---

## Projects

### Merchandising Analytics Project  
**BYU-Idaho** — Jan 2026 – Present  

- Analyzed sales and inventory data using Excel and Power BI  
- Identified merchandising gaps and revenue optimization opportunities  

---

## Additional Skills

- Data Analysis & Business Insights  
- Process Improvement  
- Stakeholder Collaboration  
- Bilingual: English & Portuguese
